deliveries.commentary: A bit of shape away but it's wide. Back of length, Kishan shapes to cut and then leaves
Length on leg, flicked to deep square leg
A bit of movement in. Length on off, flicked to the leg side of the pitch
Skids through. Beats bat and half-volleys the keeper. Seam-up length ball landed around off and slanted away, Frylinck looking to punch to cover
Length in the channel, punches to cover
Wide and full, struck well but the drive finds cover.
Wide on a length, swinging away, looks to belt it with a cross-bat. Under-edges to mid-on
Pitched up on middle, punched defensively to mid-on's right
Crunched off the back foot through point. Chopped on top of the bounce, at waist-height. It was more of a caress than a cut
Back of length outside off, punched to deep cover point
Length on off, defended off the back foot towards point

A bit of movement away, might've been off the seam, and it creates the edge. Slip was out and this went to short third on the bounce. Hard length just outside off, Steenkamp looking for a stand-tall drive through cover
Hardik getting his own medicine back, straight slap to a wide-ish full ball. This was angling away, Frylinck driving and finishing the follow-through just above late
Beaten this time and Frylinck is disappointed. Followed the hard-length ball outside off, wanted to slap it on the up through cover. Misses
Dances down and crrrunches it over deep midwicket. Sound off that was batting ASMR. Shortish ball at the waist, made room and pulled it flat with the freest of swings
Nearly a chop-on. Frylinck making room again, looking to bunt it to point as Hardik went a touch fuller. Got it wide of the stumps
Two sounds but lbw is given. Kishan reviews straight away. Was a length ball on leg that Kishan tried to heave over midwicket. Ultra-Edge shows that tickled the toe of the bat on the way to the pad
Full and that's swatted over midwicket. Leg-stump half-volley, Kishan able to lift it over the infield with ease
Slow bouncer outside off tennis-bounces its way over the head. Let go
Full again. Looks to smear it across to the leg side. Gets it off the bottom of the bat to mid-on
Wide full toss slips out and nearly does the trick. Frylinck flat-bats it from around the wide tramline. It's off the bottom of the bat but lands to the left of mid-off, who charged across.
Dances down and gets the ball on a full length. Just down leg but he's behind it as he punches to mid-on
Wobble ball has been smeared across through square leg. Frylinck stands tall and pulls the back of length ball at the stumps. Bat turned in a touch but went hard
Swept fine. Trumpelmann scrambles the seam and goes full, Kishan gets on one knee and helps it behind square
Back of length outside off, steered to deep point
Back of length outside off, cut to deep point
Back of length just outside off, squares him up a touch and the defensive push goes towards third
Pitched up cross-seamer, on the pads. Easy runs. Tilak flicks it wide of the keeper to bring up India's fifty

Premeditates the scoop, has to reverse it as Dube goes outside off with the yorker. Toes it to short third. His bat gets stuck while running, that too just before the crease. Had Bumrah hit, Loftie-Eaton was gone
Fuller side of length outside off, guided to short third
Thick edge flies over short third. Steenkamp on one knee, trying to drive the full ball over cover.
Another sweep, might be Kishan's third to a pacer tonight. Leg-stump line is all he needs to get on one leg and launch it over fine leg. This was wobble-seam and fullish
Flat-bat pull over mid-on . Goes back in the crease to the bouncer around off, gets leg side of the ball and heaves it from chest-height
Dances down and boshes it over long-on! He steadies himself and swings across, picks it off a length.
Wide on a length, let go.
Under-edge goes between keeper and short fine leg. Back of length outside off, Tilak slanting a touch as he looked to cut it through point, got it past off stump
Length down leg, goes past the leg glance
Short outside ff, pulled to wide long-on. 130ks
Take him on seems to be the message, So, Loftie-Eaton makes room and slaps it off a shortish length to mid-on. Spliced it

Dropped at backward point, Steenkamp moved to the right and tried to take it with both hands. Rotated as the ball went to the other side. Into the ground. Ball was outside off and cut hard and flat by Tilak
Full on off, driven to point
Skipper strikes first ball! 102ks length ball slanting in with the angle. Lands in line and finishes around leg, pulled with a crouch and finds deep midwicket. Ends Kishan's blitz
Googly through him. First-ball strike for Varun. Steenkamp making room to lift the length ball through cover, lost his shape completely as he can't adjust to the angle in. Hits middle and leg. 93ks
Length outside off, looks to drive through cover, gets an inside edge onto pad
Full on off, defended to the bowler. Erasmus, unlike Steenkamp, has a sighter
Shortish and wide. SKY leans across and sweeps it on the rise. Under-edges it to short fine leg. Yes and no with the running but no one took off, even as the bowler backed up
Length just outside off, coming in with the angle. Under-edged cut goes past the stumps and towards fine leg
Length on leg, worked back to the bowler
Length on off, worked to long-on
Full outside off, driven to deep cover
Erasmus reached out far forward for the slog sweep. went a touch high but that was placed in the gap at deep midwicket. Just over the cushions
Worked off the pads to the leg side
Pushed quicker. Full just outside off, punched to cover
Dances down and goes inside out to a length ball. Long-off stops it
Erasmus goes for a slinger, just over the shoulder, the shortish ball slants well wide of off. Let go
Intent. Check. Execution not as much. Erasmus shows all stumps before delivery, length ball at 97ks is at the stumps, swiped to long-on
Full and flat, on the legs, beats the flick and hits pad
Might be gone, yep. Axar gets around to it at long-off. Loftie-Eaton charges down and looks to drive the 94ks ball, angling in but just outside off, on the up. Got a thick edge
Length just outside off, darted again, punched to long-on
Length on off, punched to cover

SKY doesn't take much time to plonk his bat back in but he's walking. Shows how good the keeping was, Green reading the spin away, keeping his hands close to the stumps and pushing the hands through. Scholtz beat SKY with spin and in the air. Delivered a length ball around off as SKY danced down looking to go inside out. Went for the full launch and looked to land the bat back in one motion. Namibia pulling this back

Long-off in play again... and takes it. Captain gone and Namibia lose another. Length ball outside off from around the wicket, Erasmus made room and looked to swipe it across but got a top edge. Game effectively done?
Round-arm but gets a bit of spin. Length on off, defended straight
Length around off, looks to punch to cover. Inside edges to the leg side
Length on middle, pushes it with a vertical bat in front of point
Full on middle and leg, flicked to midwicket
Low slinger from around the wicket. On a length at leg, flicked to deep midwicket
Shortish on off, defended to the bowler
Full and flat on off, driven to long-off
Length ball hits high on the pad. Skidded through to beat the flick
Erasmus' slingers are working. India not taking them on. He bends low but keeps his arms up. Length just outside off, looks to drive through cover. Inside edge onto pad
Short ball over off, ducks under and keeps his bat down
Pitched up outside off, driven to long-off
Shout for lbw... turned down. SKY and Kishan discuss, latter says impact might be the issue. Was a length ball slanting in that beat the sweep and hit pad
Fullish and wide, driven to long-off
Dances down and heaves the fullish ball off the bottom of the bat. It's in the massive gap between deep midwicket and long-on
Round-arm, driven into a length just outside off. Straight drive off the back foot, bowler fumbles but Hardik doesn't run

Bumrah takes a stunner, running to the left from short fine leg. The issue was he almost stood for a moment and looked lost, then fell to the left and took it with both stretched hands. Kruger went for the sweep, wanted to go square and along the ground. Got a top edge
Stand and tonk! First boundary in 18 balls. Old-school Hardik, taking a step down leg, staying side on and calmly driving a length ball on the rise, over long-on, for an 88-metre six
Full on leg, flicked through midwicket
Fullish on middle and off, flicked to deep-backward square
Length just outside off, guided to point
Keeps coming in. Length ball on leg, flicked through midwicket
Short on off, pulled to deep midwicket
Full on off, worked to the bowler
Wide full toss slants past the tramline, let go
Length on middle and leg, flicked behind square
Looks to play with the wide line but misses this time. The length ball is let go
Might've been a nick, bounces on the way to the keeper, who gets on one knee and is hit on the chest. Was a length ball outside off that Trumpelmann looked to slog across
Nearly a top-tier six! 107 metres. This one sat up and slanted in, Dube pulled it almost with a whiplash. Big swivel, lot of power
Length outside off, pulled to long-on
Low full toss down leg, beats the flick and the keeper
Full on off, worked to wide long-on
Full and wide, driven straight to cover.
Fullish on the pads, beats the attempted lofted flick and goes off the pad to the leg side. Siren goes off, Dube's overstepped
So Hardik takes a couple of steps across and looks to flay it straight. Bat-face opened on impact and the full ball ball went on the bounce to long-off
Free hit is a slower one into the pitch that turns away and beats the pull. Hits the body
Wide again. Low full toss. Dube reaches out and bunts it through point. Might've been wide had he left it
Low full toss is a slower one down leg, goes past the sweep
On the bounce to deep-backward point. Just outside off, full, Dube looked to launch it over cover. Got a thick outside edge that went up
Wide on a length, slapped to mid-off
Full on leg, flicked to deep-backward square
Short ball rushes him. Green jumps and swivels as he short-arm pulls to midwicket as a last-ditch effort
Wide and full, squeezed out to deep point
Full on middle and off, driven towards cover
Hardik stands deep in the crease and goes further back. Can't do too much with a well executed wide yorker. Square driven to deep point
Leg-stump yorker at 122ks. Right on the crease that lands, and is worked to long-on
Deep cover well placed direction-wise but this lands well in front. Was a fullish wide ball that was slapped while reaching out
Taken at long-on by Axar. Slower one outside off, Scholtz made room and slashed. Got an edge as Scholtz was on the move and short-armed it
Short third and backward point are beaten! The latter dove to the right and didn't get a hand on it. Pin-point yorker just outside off, Dube opening the face and jamming the bat over it
Smit is putting on an exhibition of yorkers. Just outside off, whipped to long-on
Length ball has been smoked over cow corner and Hardik brings up fifty. Low base again

Brilliancy at deep-backward square. Leicher, the sub, ran to the right, threw the ball up, ran behind the ropes before coming back in and taking it cleanly. Was a low full toss that was swatted flat, from the crease

Is that a hit wicket? Seems like it. Bails are gone. Green went for the reverse sweep, had his feet wide apart and side by side. Followed through with the shot, the bat then hit the top of off stump as the full ball harmlessly went to the keeper

Slinger creates a... run out! Wide length ball, Rinku slaps it straight to cover, takes a couple of steps and gives Dube a yes no. Dube runs further and is sold halfway down. Gentle throw to the bowler and Namibia have two in two
Wide on a length, round-armer is let go
Full and slow on leg, driven to long-on. Side-arm and 25-yard release

Review or no? Was there a sound, is Hardik's question. SKY asks others and decides not to take it. Bouncer around head-height, beat the pull. May have grazed the top of the helmet as Frylinck swivelled. Not even that, there was a sound though
This one comes in, a touch too much. May have been an inside edge as Samson tried to flick it towards square leg. Ball hits pad
Fullish just outside off, punched to mid-off

Launched over the sightscreen. A serene downswing from Samson, through the line, straight bat. No footwork again, but this ball was a touch fuller and just outside off. Both feet in the crease as Samson played that
Back of length on the pads, flicked to deep fine leg
Back of length angling outside off, Kishan looks to cut and under-edges to midwicket

Frylinck finds the fielder and Arshdeep does the Siu celebration. 250 T20 wickets he has. 120ks knuckle ball into a short length. Doesn't rise much and Frylinck is into the pull a touch too early. Deep midwicket, just brought in, takes the catch
Swings hard but gets it off the bottom of the bat to deep midwicket. Fullish ball angling in towards off stump, Kishan looking to slog it
Length outside off, punched to point
Length on fourth, defended to short third
Pitched up outside off, punched nicely to the left of cover. Dive and a parry to the left allows two
Offcutter on a length right over the tramline is let go
Dances down, reaches out and slaps it over cover. Keeper's back so Tilak charges at a length ball outside off, makes it look wider than it is by showing all stumps
An attacking shot but slices it over extra cover. Fullish ball outside off, looks to slash it away. Bat face opens
Fullish length on off, defended towards cover
Shortish ball at the body is pulled to deep midwicket
Keeper up but it makes no difference! This is fullish again but at the stumps, Kishan calmly dances down and hoists it overlong-on. More of a vertical-bat shot this time
Pacy bouncer, slanting away sharply. Beats the pull. This was around face-height. Steenkamp taking a couple of strides across and looking to drag it
Deep-backward square leg in play... but it clears him. 67-metre six. Into the pitch, at the body, Kishan pulls it away again
Wide on a length, cut to deep point. Namibia's fifty is up, their fastest in T20 WCs
Short and slow, it's pulled off the chest through square leg. Fifty up for Kishan and it's drinks.
Short ball follows him as he makes room, pulled into the ground. To deep midwicket. 115ks
Short ball has been carved over short third. This was pace-on, angling away outside off and Steenkamp had ample time to swing hard. Drinks
Launched.... clears deep midwicket. Kishan using his lack of height to pull a ball that's not so short yet again. At the stumps and Kishan's dining on those. Pulled this time
Good bouncer, hostile at 139ks... and the siren goes off!. No-ball. Steenkamp ducked under wit bat on shoulder
Goes across, inside the line and pulls it to bring up the fastest hundred in men's T20 WCs. Kishan gets low and hits the ball well in front of his body

Knocked over and the batter forgets it's a free hit. Stands still as Loftie-Eaton runs. They make the single in the end. Was an off-stump yorker, Steenkamp made room and pulled out of the slog as it rushed him
Overpitched on off, driven to long-on
Soft hands and it's too fine for deep third. Length ball on off, looked to defend it straight
Length on the pads, flicked to midwicket
Full outside off, driven to long-off
Flat and fast, at the stump. Good length too. Punched back to the bowler
Wide on a length, looks to drive through cover. Beats the base of the bat. That kept a touch low
Full ball, driven to cover
Misfield at short third by Bumrah, allows a single. Was a fullish ball angling in that was reverse swept against the angle
This is even better! You don't sweep Axar and Erasmus has sixed him twice. Nails the slog sweep. On one knee, picked up from middle and off, tall six over midwicket
Length outside off, bunted in front of point
Swept... almost to short fine leg. Length ball angling into middle, Erasmus taking a big step across to get inside the line
SKY takes a big forward stride across the line and slog sweeps a fullish ball angling in, over short fine leg. Good fielding by Shikongo, sliding and keeping it to one
Looped on a length outside off, punched to point. 83ks
Slinger again. Length on off, big slant in, punched to long-off

Varun calmly dismantling Namibia here. Smit is another batter trying to whack him from the outset and losing his wicket. 94ks googly lands on a length and holds its line. Smit misses the on-the-rise slog sweep and sees his off stump hit
Long leg runs across but can't stop it. Goes just over the boundary. Length ball around off stump, SKY getting on one knee again
Length around off, flicked to deep midwicket
Wide not called. The length ball was close to the tramline, SKY was around off as he tried to chop it while bending. Slinger again
Length on off, punched to long-off
Length just outside off, worked off the back foot to midwicket
Length outside off, punched to the bowler's left
Length on leg, worked to midwicket
Axar running through his over. Length on off, dances down and punches to the bowler
Round-arm, canting into middle leg. Flicked off a length to midwicket
Fullish on middle, defended to the bowler
Punched to cover from a length
Length on leg, clipped to square leg

Erasmus' 25-yarder works. Long-off runs left and takes it! Tilak dancing down and driving a length ball through the line. Went off the bottom of the bat. India lose their third wicket in their second-six overs
Full on leg, flicked to midwicket
Low full toss is worked back to the bowler. Erasmus dives to the left, and for a moment does a push up with Hardik over him as Hardik tried to move away and tumbled
Length just outside off, guided to deep third. Back to normal for Bumrah
Length on leg, flicked to deep midwicket
Length outside off, driven to long-off
Fullish on leg, flicked to midwicket
Very full on leg, flicked to deep midwicket
Beats bat. Length ball just outside off, looks to swat it off the back foot through midwicket
Length around off, opens the face and pushes it behind point
Trumpelmann ran halfway, circled back and was able to do it safely as Axar didn't pick up the ball cleanly at point. Was a yorker on leg that beat the flick and deflected off the pad
Shortish ball on off, pulled to deep midwicket
Full on leg, clipped to midwicket. Drinks
Overpitched, driven wide of cover, who dives in despair. A bit of room, Hardik beside the ball and drills it firmly. Drinks
Wide and full, jammed to wide long-off
Wide and slowish, pulled to long-on
Scholtz's wide line backfires again. Hardik's reach is good enough even with middle and off stump visible. Slaps the wide length ball, just inside the tramline, over long-off
Fullish on leg, flicked to deep midwicket
Wide and full, Hardik looks to scythe it through point and misses
Short ball over off, Green gets too far inside the line, then back as he gets beaten on the ramp
Misfield by point to the right. No one behind him. Was a full ball outside off that Hardik chomped with a drive
Full just outside off, driven to long-off
Slot ball has been smacked straight of long-off. Line doesn't matter if the ball's full and finishing just under the knee-roll. Hardik gets across and has a big slash
Short outside off, slapped back to the bowler on the bounce
Hardik's straight hits aren't exactly with a straight bat, it is diagonal and the toe of the bat points from short-third to long-on and then back. Ball goes straighter than it did last

Back of hand slower ball beats the pull and hits the thigh. India've reviewed. Was a shortish ball on middle and leg, hit him high on the leg, around the groin. Hawk-Eye shows that'd go over the stumps
Wide yorker has been scythed behind point with precision. Good ball, amazing response. Hardik gives the bowler a tap o the side of the shoulder. Didn't do much wrong
Another wide. Down leg, goes past the flick. Dube has overstepped again. Four extras in the over, three counted
Hits the pads and goes to the leg side. Full ball on leg, Hardik takes a step across and looks to swat it behind square. Misses

Yorker brings out cheers in the crowd. Both bails gone. Seam up, landed just inside the crease. Trumpelmann mad room and looked to block it with bat jamming on bat, drilled it back onto the stumps. Bumrah walks back right after
Full outside off, driven hard and flat. On the bounce to long-off
Scholtz is ready for the attempted yorker. Full toss is low and just outside off, guided through backward point
Low full toss on off, pushes down the ground
Short ball is pulled from outside off to mid-off
Full toss, gets away with it. Around knee-height outside off, Hardik springs up and slaps it to long-off
